Hi there,

Thank you for your submission. We really enjoyed the bright vibrant guitar tones here alongside the prominent bassline the mix. Excellent soaring lead vocals with a well measured supporting harmonies. Great ambient sound textures at the back of the mix. However for our indie rock playlist we are looking for song that have a more high tempo energetic sound similar to garage rock artist like The Libertines. Of course that are just our own personal preference and are subjective. A good release though.

Best of luck with your continued promotional efforts.

Quang
Andrew X Team
Hey there, quality and enjoyable song, very well performed (great guitars) but overall I prefer something a little punchier. Sorry about that, just a personal taste, the song is quality.

Hello and thanks for the submission,t he track is very nice, cool guitar parts and vocals, clean sound and mix, profession instrumental and vibe. Pleasant song you have here! Guitar riffs are cool along the way and vocals are great. I am looking for more aggressive indie rock/post punk tracks for this playlist though, which mood is not quite a fit so I will have to pass. Thank you for sharing though!

Hey, thank you so much for the submission! We really appreciate it. This was a fun song, and the production was excellent. Nice work putting it together! We enjoyed the vocal performance as well, but unfortunately, this is more on the adult contemporary and traditional pop rock side for our indie channel. So sorry that we'll have to decline due to genre, but we wish you the best and really hope that this finds a home on many playlists. Take care, and feel free to send anything in the future. 😊

Hi, thanks for sending this over! Loving the guitar work here! Has a bit of a Stevie Wonder feel on the verse! It's a cool track, it's just a bit too upbeat for me. I tend to lean toward more melancholic, dreamy indie like Bon Iver, Novo Amor, Lowswimmer, Beach House, etc. Still a nice track! Hopefully we'll connect on a track soon!
The vocals on this track are powerful and the chorus is catchy, but the rest of the song is too classic-rock leaning, especially guitar-wise. Thanks for sending this across though!
killer guitar work here and the vocals are on point. unfortunately this one is more of a bluesy rock vibe rather than the indie folk im looking for but this was really great! thanks for sending!
